notes:
I tried different Proton versions, including the default Steam uses, Proton Experimental and Proton CachyOS 10.0-20260227. Every one of them allows me to get to the menu, but doesn't allow me to get past the "Press Enter" splash screen.

I also tried to disable Steam Input and nothing, as well as turning it on and switching to another configuration. Not my keyboard nor my controller works to get past the splash screen.
works great besides the first ubisoft connect loads
